column1: # M6 LLM evaluation set. Columns: lang <TAB> words (tapped labels, space-separated) <TAB> gold sentence.
# The "words" column is the telegraphic pictogram sequence the user selects; "gold" is a
# natural, faithful sentence a native speaker would accept. Used to score both the raw
# baseline model and the fine-tuned 270M (docs/llm-experiment.md). Reuses / extends the
# nlg golden corpus with realistic board compositions. Extend freely; keep it therapist-
# reviewable. Grammatical-acceptability and human-preference are scored per row.
